executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 3462 threat advisories. Of these, 1658 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 844 as HIGH risk. 1 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST, CDB-CVE-GEN, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
